message:
chore(beads): Add comprehensive feature parity beads (24 total)

Created detailed beads for ALL remaining Python FastMCP v2.14.4 features:

EPIC: bd-2mq - Complete Feature Parity

Component Metadata:
- bd-3ib: Tags infrastructure
- bd-yn6: Icons infrastructure
- bd-mwy: Versioning metadata
- bd-39t: Tag filtering (include_tags/exclude_tags)

Server Configuration:
- bd-b17: Error masking (mask_error_details)
- bd-2js: Strict input validation
- bd-3ro: Duplicate handling (on_duplicate)

Server Composition:
- bd-9m0: mount() composition
- bd-2hm: as_proxy() composition
- bd-2d4: Dynamic enable/disable per-session

Handler Configuration:
- bd-11w: output_schema for tools
- bd-205: MCP tool annotations
- bd-35z: Per-handler timeout

Client Enhancements:
- bd-1hk: Auto-initialize behavior
- bd-3al: Task management methods

Context Enhancements:
- bd-3fb: ctx.read_resource()
- bd-2ej: ctx.call_tool()
- bd-216: ctx.capabilities()

CLI Commands:
- bd-7eq: fastmcp dev
- bd-1rb: fastmcp list
- bd-133: fastmcp test
- bd-3ux: fastmcp tasks

Providers:
- bd-3mi: FilesystemProvider

All beads include detailed requirements, implementation notes,
Rust patterns, security considerations, and testing strategies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
